rationale: Keep this pair because the citing paper’s core mechanism is process- vs outcome-focused mental simulation, and the cited paper is explicitly about process vs outcome simulation effects on adoption outcomes and uncertainty management. The construct overlap is direct (mental simulation type, temporal framing, adoption judgments), so the citation is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than a generic mention. With only DOI-level match evidence and no in-text snippet, it is still not safe to drop as obvious mention-only.
